name: Dropbox
description: Manage files and folders, share links, and access file metadata via the Dropbox API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Interact with the Dropbox API to list folders, get file metadata, create folders, delete files, copy, move, search, and manage shared links.

tools.name: list_folder
tools.description: List the contents of a Dropbox folder.

path.desc: The path to the folder (e.g. /Documents). Use empty string for root.

recursive.desc: If true, list the contents of all subdirectories.

include_media_info.desc: If true, include media information for photo and video files.

include_deleted.desc: If true, include deleted files and folders.

limit.desc: Maximum number of results to return per request.

tools.name: get_metadata
tools.description: Retrieve metadata for a file or folder at the given path.

path.desc: The path to the file or folder (e.g. /Documents/report.pdf).

include_media_info.desc: If true, include media information for photos and videos.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder in Dropbox.

path.desc: The path of the folder to create (e.g. /Projects/NewFolder).

autorename.desc: If true, rename the folder if a conflict exists.

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a file or folder at the given path.

path.desc: The path to the file or folder to delete.

tools.name: copy
tools.description: Copy a file or folder from one location to another in Dropbox.

from_path.desc: The source path of the file or folder to copy.

to_path.desc: The destination path for the copy.

autorename.desc: If true, rename the destination if a conflict exists.

tools.name: move
tools.description: Move a file or folder from one location to another in Dropbox.

from_path.desc: The source path of the file or folder to move.

autorename.desc: If true, rename the destination if a conflict exists.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for files and folders in Dropbox by name or content.

options.desc: Search options object. Can include: path (string), max_results (integer), file_status (active/deleted), filename_only (boolean), file_categories (array).

tools.name: create_shared_link
tools.description: Create a shared link for a file or folder in Dropbox.

path.desc: The path to the file or folder to share.

settings.desc: Sharing settings object. Can include: requested_visibility (public/team_only/password), audience, access (viewer/editor).

tools.name: list_shared_links
tools.description: List shared links for a file or folder, or all shared links for the account.

path.desc: The path to list shared links for. Omit to list all shared links.

direct_only.desc: If true, only return links that apply directly to the path.

tools.name: get_space_usage
tools.description: Retrieve storage space usage information for the Dropbox account.
